title: Identifier
description: A typed external identifier. Use 'system' to namespace identifiers and prevent collisions across jurisdictions and organisations

system.description: Namespace URI or name identifying the issuing authority or system. Use URN format where possible for unambiguous identification

value.description: The identifier value itself. Format depends on the system — may include hyphens, spaces, or check digits as appropriate

type.description: Human-readable type label describing what kind of identifier this is
